Class ScatterBrush

java.lang.Object
com.fastasyncworldedit.core.command.tool.brush.ScatterBrush
All Implemented Interfaces:
Brush
Direct Known Subclasses:
ScatterCommand, ScatterOverlayBrush, ShatterBrush, SplatterBrush
public class ScatterBrush extends Object implements Brush

      Build the object.
      Specified by:
      build in interface Brush
      Parameters:
      editSession - the EditSession
      position - the position
      pattern - the pattern
      size - the size of the brush
      Throws:
      MaxChangedBlocksException - if the maximum block change limit is exceeded
